metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the payments-and-revenue-infrastructure domain.

bricks.name: Merchant Payments
bricks.description: Buyer-facing payment acceptance and conversion capabilities.

children.name: Hosted Checkout
children.description: Hosted payment session experience optimized for fast launch and ongoing conversion improvements.

internalModules.title: Session orchestration
internalModules.description: Creates and manages buyer-facing hosted payment sessions.

interfaces.title: Hosted buyer payment UI
interfaces.description: Stripe-hosted checkout interface.

children.name: Payment Elements
children.description: Embeddable payment form components with centralized method logic and wallet support.

internalModules.title: Payment form rendering
internalModules.description: Delivers embeddable payment components across buyer surfaces.

interfaces.title: Embedded payment UI
interfaces.description: Customizable payment element rendered in merchant surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses payment method ranking and eligibility logic.

children.name: Payment Links
children.description: Low-code payment collection surfaces for one-off and lightweight commerce flows.

internalModules.title: Hosted link generation
internalModules.description: Creates hosted payment and collection links for operators.

interfaces.title: Payment link management UI
interfaces.description: Dashboard workflow for link creation and monitoring.

children.name: Payment Method Orchestration
children.description: Selection, ordering, and eligibility logic for cards, wallets, and local payment methods.

internalModules.title: Method eligibility engine
internalModules.description: Determines available methods by geography, device, and merchant configuration.

interfaces.title: Method configuration UI
interfaces.description: Operator controls for payment method availability and preferences.

children.name: Authorization Optimization
children.description: Improves legitimate payment success through retries, tokens, and issuer-aware optimization.

internalModules.title: Authorization decision optimizer
internalModules.description: Tunes retries, network tokens, and confirmation paths.

interfaces.title: Authorization analytics UI
interfaces.description: Shows approval, decline, and recovery diagnostics.

brickDependencies.description: Uses fraud and risk signals to preserve good approvals.

children.name: Terminal and Reader Operations
children.description: Reader provisioning, card-present payment acceptance, and in-person operational control.

internalModules.title: Reader fleet management
internalModules.description: Manages reader lifecycle, connectivity, and configuration.

interfaces.title: Reader operations UI
interfaces.description: Operator workflow for reader assignment and health.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared money-state logic across online and in-person flows.

bricks.name: Revenue Automation
bricks.description: Recurring monetization, tax, and accounting automation capabilities.

children.name: Subscription and Price Management
children.description: Product, price, recurring lifecycle, and proration controls for recurring businesses.

internalModules.title: Pricing and subscription state engine
internalModules.description: Manages plans, prices, renewals, and lifecycle changes.

interfaces.title: Billing configuration UI
interfaces.description: Operator workflow for price and subscription management.

children.name: Usage Metering and Rating
children.description: Captures usage events, rating logic, and billable volume for hybrid pricing models.

internalModules.title: Meter ingestion and rating
internalModules.description: Ingests usage events and converts them into billable amounts.

interfaces.title: Meter definitions UI
interfaces.description: Operator controls for meters and pricing rules.

brickDependencies.description: Uses product and pricing metadata from the subscription model.

children.name: Invoicing and Collections
children.description: Invoice generation, collection workflows, reminders, and dunning behavior.

internalModules.title: Invoice lifecycle orchestration
internalModules.description: Creates invoices and manages payment collection states.

interfaces.title: Invoice operations UI
interfaces.description: Dashboard for invoice review, reminders, and retries.

brickDependencies.description: Uses payment success optimization during collection.

children.name: Tax Determination and Registration
children.description: Tax obligation monitoring, calculation, and registration support across geographies.

internalModules.title: Tax rules and obligation engine
internalModules.description: Evaluates tax applicability and registration thresholds.

interfaces.title: Tax dashboard
interfaces.description: Operator workflow for registrations and tax monitoring.

brickDependencies.description: Uses billing and transaction details for tax calculation.

children.name: Revenue Recognition
children.description: Automates revenue schedules and accounting treatment from Stripe event data.

internalModules.title: Recognition rules engine
internalModules.description: Applies accounting logic to billing and payment events.

interfaces.title: Revenue reporting UI
interfaces.description: Operator workflow for revenue schedules and accounting review.

brickDependencies.description: Uses payment and settlement event history for accounting outputs.

children.name: Reporting, Sigma, and Data Export
children.description: Queryable reporting, exports, and operational analytics across Stripe workflows.

internalModules.title: Reporting and export engine
internalModules.description: Builds dashboards, scheduled exports, and queryable data surfaces.

interfaces.title: Reporting UI
interfaces.description: Operator reporting and query workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared financial event data across products.

bricks.name: Platform Money Movement
bricks.description: Counterparty onboarding, platform funds flows, and embedded financial workflows.

children.name: Connected Account Lifecycle
children.description: Account types, capability state, lifecycle transitions, and platform controls for counterparties.

internalModules.title: Account capability orchestration
internalModules.description: Tracks connected-account state, requirements, and activation logic.

interfaces.title: Connected account UI
interfaces.description: Operator workflows for account lifecycle and status management.

brickDependencies.description: Uses verification requirements to decide account status.

children.name: KYC and KYB Verification
children.description: Business and individual verification workflows required to activate and maintain accounts.

internalModules.title: Verification workflow engine
internalModules.description: Collects and validates required KYC and KYB data.

interfaces.title: Onboarding verification UI
interfaces.description: Hosted and operator-assisted verification workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses identity document checks for stronger assurance where needed.

children.name: Identity Verification
children.description: Document and identity verification workflows used in higher-assurance onboarding and fraud-sensitive scenarios.

internalModules.title: Identity evidence verification
internalModules.description: Evaluates documents and identity signals for onboarding or compliance flows.

interfaces.title: Identity capture UI
interfaces.description: Hosted identity verification flow.

children.name: Funds Routing and Split Settlement
children.description: Moves money between platform and counterparties while applying fees, reserves, and settlement rules.

internalModules.title: Split settlement engine
internalModules.description: Calculates fee shares, reserves, and transfers across parties.

interfaces.title: Funds flow controls UI
interfaces.description: Operator workflow for platform fee and settlement settings.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared money-state and balance bookkeeping.

children.name: Global Payouts and Treasury Workflows
children.description: Outbound payouts, scheduling, rails management, and treasury-adjacent money movement workflows.

internalModules.title: Payout execution engine
internalModules.description: Schedules and executes outbound money movement across payout rails.

interfaces.title: Payout operations UI
interfaces.description: Operator workflow for payout timing, failures, and status.

brickDependencies.description: Uses routed balances and settlement outcomes to trigger payouts.

children.name: Issuing and Spend Controls
children.description: Card issuing, spend controls, and programmatic card use cases for platforms and businesses.

internalModules.title: Card program controls
internalModules.description: Manages card issuance and spend policy behavior.

interfaces.title: Card program UI
interfaces.description: Operator workflow for issuing programs and controls.

children.name: Capital and Financing Offers
children.description: Financing and capital offer workflows tied to performance and money-movement history.

internalModules.title: Offer and repayment engine
internalModules.description: Generates financing offers and repayment logic based on platform or merchant activity.

interfaces.title: Capital offer UI
interfaces.description: Operator and recipient workflow for financing visibility and acceptance.

brickDependencies.description: Uses historical transaction and payout data to assess eligibility.

bricks.name: Shared Financial Foundations
bricks.description: Shared risk, financial state, operator, and integration foundations across the Stripe domain.

children.name: Fraud Detection and Adaptive Risk Controls
children.description: AI-assisted fraud scoring, adaptive controls, and operator workflows across payment and platform activity.

internalModules.title: Risk scoring and controls engine
internalModules.description: Evaluates transaction and behavioral signals to apply adaptive controls.

interfaces.title: Risk review UI
interfaces.description: Fraud operations workflow and rule configuration surface.

children.name: Disputes and Chargeback Operations
children.description: Chargeback handling, evidence workflows, and loss management across payment products.

internalModules.title: Dispute case orchestration
internalModules.description: Tracks dispute lifecycle, evidence, and outcomes.

interfaces.title: Dispute operations UI
interfaces.description: Operator workflow for dispute review and evidence management.

brickDependencies.description: Uses risk context to support case handling and loss analysis.

children.name: Balances and Internal Ledger
children.description: Shared money-state ledger across charges, invoices, transfers, refunds, and payouts.

internalModules.title: Financial event ledger
internalModules.description: Records and reconciles money-state transitions across product lines.

interfaces.title: Balance state UI
interfaces.description: Operator views into balances and money movement state.

children.name: Reconciliation and Balance Operations
children.description: Exception handling, payout understanding, and finance-operations workflows built on Stripe's money-state model.

internalModules.title: Reconciliation exception workflow
internalModules.description: Explains and resolves mismatches between financial events and cash movement.

interfaces.title: Reconciliation UI
interfaces.description: Finance and operations workflow for investigating balance and payout issues.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared ledger events and balances as the basis for exception handling.

children.name: Eventing and Webhooks
children.description: Outbound event delivery and integration hooks for payment, billing, and platform workflows.

internalModules.title: Event dispatch engine
internalModules.description: Publishes reliable workflow events to customer systems.

interfaces.title: Webhook configuration UI
interfaces.description: Developer workflow for event subscriptions and endpoint management.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared developer authentication and environment controls.

children.name: Developer API and Dashboard Foundations
children.description: Shared API credentials, dashboard foundations, environment controls, and operator experience.

internalModules.title: Developer platform control plane
internalModules.description: Manages keys, environments, permissions, and common dashboard behaviors.

interfaces.title: Dashboard shell and developer UI
interfaces.description: Shared developer and operator workspace foundation.
